name: summit-insights
description: Summit Insights internal Claude tools. The Summit Concept Framework: add concepts and manage them through to handoff, all published to the shared X:\Labs Concept Dashboard.

plugins.name: summit-concepts
plugins.description: Summit Concept Framework. Concept Writers add/build/submit concepts with the summit-concept skill; Strategists harvest/freeze/promote/hand off CDRs with summit-cdr. Every run publishes to the shared X:\Labs Concept Dashboard.
